states.name: Calm Calibration
states.action: One-pixel breathing, relaxed claws, mouse-directed gaze, one short blink.

states.name: Blanket Drag
states.action: Stretch, grow sleepy, catch the blanket with one claw, and drag it into place.

states.name: Blanket Burrito
states.action: Bundle into the blanket, close both eyes, and breathe slowly under the top fold.

states.name: Blanket Pop
states.accessory: the same soft purple blanket split into two folds
states.action: Spring upward, throw both blanket folds aside, blink once, and return to neutral.

states.name: Shell Shuffle
states.accessory: three colorful shells on a small cloth
states.action: Check each shell in turn, lift the chosen middle shell, blink, and reset.

states.name: Token Knitting
states.accessory: yarn ball, two needles, and a growing striped ribbon
states.action: Alternate both needles, grow the ribbon through four beats, inspect it, and reset.

states.name: Hatchling Parade
states.action: Wake the helpers one by one, point them forward, and watch them scurry away.

states.name: Stuck Jar
states.action: Twist twice, strain, pause, then push the jar toward the owner for help.

states.name: Accordion Fold
states.accessory: one long connected four-panel paper strip
states.action: Fold the strip panel by panel into a compact packet, inspect it, and unfold for the next cycle.

states.name: Pop-up Studio
states.accessory: flat paper packet that opens into two walls and a small desk
states.action: Pull both paper walls outward, lift the desk, and tap the two sides to settle the studio.

states.name: Self High-five
states.action: Crouch, hop two pixels, bring both claws together overhead, land, and settle.

states.name: Yarn Tangle
states.accessory: red yarn ball and one continuous irregular yarn loop
states.action: Pull the yarn, become tangled, tug in the opposite direction, pause low, and reset to try again.
